content_body: With a recent death in the family, this trip was much needed. This is by far one of the cleanest rentals we've ever stayed in. I highly recommend Cowgirl Up Stables for a beautiful trail ride. The views are amazing and my boys loved the game room. Our top restaurant recommendations are Chesters and Harvest on Main! We are definitely keeping Above the Timberline in our minds for when we return.
title: A Much Needed Trip
